info.title: NuGetDefense
info.description: NuGetDefense was inspired by [OWASP SafeNuGet](https://nuget.org/packages/SafeNuGet/) but aims to check with multiple sources for known vulnerabilities.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --project-file
options.description: Project or Solution File to scan

options.name: --target-framework-moniker
options.description: Framework to use when detecting versions for 'sdk style' projects

options.name: --warn-only
options.description: Disables errors that would break a build, but outputs warnings for each report [default: False]

options.name: --check-transitive-dependencies
options.description: Enables scanning of transitive dependencies [default: True]

options.name: --check-project-references
options.description: Enables scanning projects referenced by the target project [default: False]

options.name: --ignore-packages
options.description: Adds names to a list of packages to ignore [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --ignore-cves
options.description: Adds listed vulnerabilities to a list that is ignored when reporting [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --cache-location
options.description: location used to retrieve the cache

commands.name: Update
commands.description: Updates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

options.name: --vuln-data-file
options.description: Path to use for the vuln data file

commands.name: Recreate-NVD
commands.description: Recreates the Offline NVD Vulnerability source

options.name: --vuln-data-file
options.description: Path to use for the vuln data file
